subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me turning in supplication to the horizon of Thy mercy, abased and lowly before the kingdom of Thy divinity, detached from all else save Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی متضرعا الی افق رحمانیتک متذللا منکسرا الی ملکوت ربانیتک منقطعا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
